hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Atlantic Puffin in the wild
hero.caption: The Atlantic Puffin is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Atlantic Puffin navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Atlantic Puffin finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Atlantic Puffin.

baby.alt: A young or baby Atlantic Puffin showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Atlantic Puffins must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Atlantic Puffins interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Atlantic Puffins interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Atlantic Puffin traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.caption: The size of a Atlantic Puffin can vary depending on its age and environment.
